# LLMs.txt — Machine-readable overview for AI language models
# https://localdigitalbusiness.com.au

Site: https://localdigitalbusiness.com.au
Company: Local Digital Business
Location: Melbourne, Victoria, Australia
Contact: sshah@localdigitalbusiness.com.au

Purpose: We build simple websites and smart AI assistants for sole traders and small businesses in Australia.

## What We Do

Local Digital Business helps sole traders and small businesses get found online and never miss an enquiry. We design and launch professional websites in 5 days at fixed pricing, with optional 24/7 AI chat assistants.

## Products & Services

- Professional Website (from $750): One-page or multi-page website, SEO and AEO optimised, live in 5 days, fixed pricing
- Professional Plus Website (from $980): Enhanced website with additional pages and features
- Smart AI Assistant: 24/7 chat assistant that answers enquiries and captures leads automatically
- Hosting & Maintenance: From $39.99/month — keeps your site secure and online

## Key Facts

- Live in 5 days (from brief to launch)
- Fixed upfront pricing — no hourly surprises
- We handle all technical setup (domain, hosting, SSL, SEO)
- Built for sole traders, tradies, restaurants, hairdressers, NDIS providers, food trucks, and more
- Based in Melbourne, serving all of Australia

## Topics We Cover

- What is a website and why small businesses need one
- What is SEO (Search Engine Optimisation)
- What is AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation) — appearing in AI answers
- What is an AI assistant for business
- How to get found on Google as a local business
- Domain names, hosting, SSL explained simply
- Fixed-price website packages for Australian small businesses

## Sitemap

- / — Home: Overview of services, pricing, FAQ
- /pricing — Pricing: Detailed package breakdown
- /contact — Contact: Book a free 15-minute chat
